segments.text: In this last lecture before the midterm we pull the threads together. There is a single idea running through weeks one to three, and seeing it makes the whole course easier.
Here is a problem that uses everything so far. We will solve it step by step, and I will point out where each week's material comes in.
To prepare for the midterm, focus on what is examinable, revise from the book rather than your notes alone, and re-read the sections we cited each week.
